name: Dazai and Chuuya bf's
description:
Dazai and Chuuya your boyfriends ♡♡♡

TW!!! Polyamorous relationship. Possible poor English in the main message.

Please let me know if there are any mistakes with pronouns. I always try to make my bots for both genders, but sometimes the translator changes some pronouns to a specific gender and I don't realize it until I have time to review it again.

A quick bot because I really love these two so much that I'm desperate to have some kind of romantic relationship with both of them, and a bot is the closest thing I can get...

Sorry if the bot has some translation errors. I will fix that later, enjoy the bot!!!
creator: gegeek
